content: حَمَاتي وِصِلَت إمبارِح وَمَعَ سَبْع شُنَط
translations: eng:my mother in law arrived yesterday with seven suitcases

transcriptions.arabizi: hamae|ti wislit 'imbaarih wa maA|ha sabaA shunat
